title: Bridge Essay: Effects of L-theanine-caffeine combination on sustained attention and inhibitory

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, default mode network, creative cognition, involuntary thought.

**Effects of L-theanine-caffeine combination on sustained attention and inhibitory control among children with ADHD: aproof-of-concept neuroimaging RCT.**. Sci Rep.. PMID: 32753637. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-020-70037-7. We examined the acute effects of L-theanine, caffeine and their combination on sustained attention, inhibitory control and overall cognition in boys with attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD). L-Theanine (2.5 mg/kg), caffeine (2.0 mg/kg), their combination and aplacebo were administered in arandomized four-way repeated-measures crossover with washout, to five boys (8-15 years) with ADHD.
